U_MAX_DEFLECTION.note: Q345 plate 2m x 2m x 25mm under 10kg TNT @ 2m standoff. Expected center max deflection ~93mm (3.7% L), validated against Friedlander/Kingery-Bulmash analytical.

PEEQ_MAX.note: Peak equivalent plastic strain ~2.6% indicating moderate plastic deformation localized at clamped edges.

ALLPD_MAX.note: Plastic dissipation energy 125 J (mm/MPa/t units → mJ). Mesh-dependent; use as energy budget check.
